title: Bei Qi Shu: Book of Northern Qi, Selection 3
description: From Bei Qi Shu: Book of Northern Qi: chapter 3
introduction: From Bei Qi Shu: Book of Northern Qi: chapter 3

translation.text: From Bei Qi Shu: Book of Northern Qi: A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
